metadata.ogDescription: On a weekly basis, I seem to always have at least one conversation with one of my patients in regards to white fillings. Just recently in July, I had someone ask me why their old white fillings done by their prior dentist were failing. Meanwhile some of their old silver fillings that were done during […]
